sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105913" key="tumpanotri/bhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τυμπᾰνο-τρίβης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n105913.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drummer,</tr_> esp. used of the Galli in the worship of Cybele, in Lat. form <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tympanotriba,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plaut.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Truc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">611</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
